title: Use Case Specification Template
description: Structured UCS template with basic, alternative, and exception flows per Li & Zheng (2025) Definitions 1-2

useCaseId.description: Unique identifier for the use case

role.description: Primary actor performing the use case

preconditions.description: Conditions that must hold before the use case begins

postconditions.description: Conditions that hold after successful completion

basicFlow.description: Definition 1: BF = [step1, ..., stepn] — the primary execution path

alternativeFlows.description: Definition 2: altF = {altFi | 1 ≤ i ≤ n} — conditional deviations from basic flow

exceptionFlows.description: Error paths (structurally identical to alternative flows)

businessObjects.description: Business objects referenced in this use case

relatedUseCases.description: IDs of use cases referenced by steps in this template

refUseCaseId.description: If this step delegates to another use case

deviationPoint.description: The basic flow step ID this flow branches from

triggerCondition.description: The condition that triggers this alternative/exception flow

rejoinPoint.description: The basic flow step ID to rejoin after this flow (null if it terminates the use case)
